case_title: SLOANE COOK VS. EMILE MOGANNAM JR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $37.50 - SERVED AUG-02-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM JR, EMILE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $37.50 - SERVED AUG-02-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM SR, EMILE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO EMILE MOGANNAM SR BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-18-2013 AT 8:30 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY COOK, SLOANE AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM JR, EMILE MOGANNAM SR, EMILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM JR, EMILE MOGANNAM SR, EMILE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOK, SLOANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGANNAM JR, EMILE $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,267.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST EMILE MOGANNAM, SR. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE AUTOMOBILE THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
